message:
feat: extract validate_list_args for early-fail argument checking and refine sync staleness logic

- list.rs: Extract validate_list_args() public helper that validates sort key
  and priority bounds upfront before executing the list query, enabling callers
  to fail fast on invalid arguments. Extract validate_priority_bounds() helper
  to share between build_filters and apply_client_filters. Add tests for
  invalid sort key and out-of-range priority bounds rejection.
- query.rs: Wire up early validation for query command arguments
- config/mod.rs: Add new configuration helpers for startup config resolution
- sync/mod.rs: Refine staleness computation and pending export state tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
